name: Mindsdb
tagline: MindsDB is the platform for building AI from enterprise data, enabling smarter organizations.
description:
MindsDB is the platform for building AI from enterprise data, enabling smarter organizations.

Docs: https://docs.mindsdb.com/what-is-mindsdb?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  mindsdb:
    image: mindsdb/mindsdb:latest
    environment:
      - MINDSDB_DOCKER_ENV=true
      - MINDSDB_STORAGE_DIR=/mindsdb/var
      - FLASK_DEBUG=${FLASK_DEBUG:-1}
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-b738aebc8d0f6c16659b30065fabe08e}
      - LANGFUSE_HOST=${LANGFUSE_HOST}
      - LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY=${LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY:-1807ebf63156e24c2568158695bcc675}
      - LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY=${LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY:-75543221cb6548d9721b3ae9371a08a6}
      - LANGFUSE_RELEASE=${LANGFUSE_RELEASE:-local}
      - LANGFUSE_DEBUG=${LANGFUSE_DEBUG:-False}
      - LANGFUSE_TIMEOUT=${LANGFUSE_TIMEOUT:-10}
      - LANGFUSE_SAMPLE_RATE=${LANGFUSE_SAMPLE_RATE:-1.0}
      - MINDSDB_DB_CON=postgresql://u355489f0ea:adb27f92e61f800986d1efdcb9bc4394@postgresql/${POSTGRES_DB:-mindsdb-db}
    volumes:
      - mindsdb-data:/mindsdb/var
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost:47334/api/util/ping
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42068:47334
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - mindsdb-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u355489f0ea
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=adb27f92e61f800986d1efdcb9bc4394
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-mindsdb-db}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv53086978} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-mindsdb}
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  mindsdb-data: null
  mindsdb-postgresql-data: null
